competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Conceded by Chris Richards.
Attempt blocked. Christian Pulisic (USA) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Tim Ream.

events.description: 普利西奇射门被封堵。 蒂姆·雷姆参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, USA. Conceded by Stjepan Radeljic.
Corner, USA. Conceded by Tarik Muharemovic.
Delay in match because of an injury Armin Gigovic (Bosnia and Herzegovina).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Chris Richards (USA) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 埃梅丁·德米洛维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Malik Tillman (USA) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt saved. Ermedin Demirovic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Matt Freese (USA). Assisted by Edin Dzeko.

events.description: 埃梅丁·德米洛维奇射正。 埃丁·哲科参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Conceded by Alex Freeman.
Sergiño Dest (USA) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt missed. Folarin Balogun (USA) right footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Antonee Robinson following a set piece situation.

events.description: 巴洛贡射门偏出。 安东尼·罗宾逊参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Nikola Vasilj (Bosnia and Herzegovina).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Christian Pulisic (USA) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, USA. Conceded by Tarik Muharemovic.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Antonee Robinson (USA).
Foul by Sergiño Dest (USA).
Offside, USA. Folarin Balogun is caught offside.
Foul by Chris Richards (USA).
Foul by Tyler Adams (USA).
Folarin Balogun (USA) wins a free kick on the right wing.

events.description: 塔里克·穆哈雷莫维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Folarin Balogun (USA) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box misses to the right. Assisted by Malik Tillman with a cross following a set piece situation.

events.description: 巴洛贡射门偏出。 马利克·蒂尔曼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! USA 1, Bosnia and Herzegovina 0. Folarin Balogun (USA) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal.
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时5分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Christian Pulisic (USA) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Delay in match because of an injury Tyler Adams (USA).
Corner, USA. Conceded by Sead Kolasinac.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

player.name: 埃斯米尔·巴伊拉克塔雷维奇

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Esmir Bajraktarevic replaces Armin Gigovic.

events.description: 埃斯米尔·巴伊拉克塔雷维奇替补登场，换下阿明·吉戈维奇。

qualifiers.espnText: Christian Pulisic (USA) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Benjamin Tahirovic replaces Ivan Sunjic.

events.description: 本杰明·塔希罗维奇替补登场，换下伊万·孙吉克。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Ermin Mahmic replaces Edin Dzeko because of an injury.

events.description: 埃尔敏·马赫米克替补登场，换下埃丁·哲科。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Kerim Alajbegovic (Bosnia and Herzegovina).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

relatedPlayer.name: 埃斯米尔·巴伊拉克塔雷维奇

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Nikola Katic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Esmir Bajraktarevic.

events.description: 尼古拉·卡蒂克射门偏出。 埃斯米尔·巴伊拉克塔雷维奇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Folarin Balogun (USA).
Delay in match because of an injury Tarik Muharemovic (Bosnia and Herzegovina).
Delay in match because of an injury Folarin Balogun (USA).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
VAR Decision: Card upgraded Folarin Balogun (USA).
Attempt saved. Ermedin Demirovic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Matt Freese (USA).

events.description: 埃梅丁·德米洛维奇射正。

player.name: 埃斯米尔·巴伊拉克塔雷维奇

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Esmir Bajraktarevic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Matt Freese (USA).

events.description: 埃斯米尔·巴伊拉克塔雷维奇射正。

qualifiers.espnText: Antonee Robinson (USA) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Corner, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Conceded by Antonee Robinson.

relatedPlayer.name: 埃斯米尔·巴伊拉克塔雷维奇

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Amar Dedic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Esmir Bajraktarevic.

events.description: 阿马尔·德迪奇射门被封堵。 埃斯米尔·巴伊拉克塔雷维奇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Haris Tabakovic replaces Sead Kolasinac.

events.description: 哈里斯·塔巴科维奇替补登场，换下西德·科拉西纳克。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Amar Memic replaces Nikola Katic.

events.description: 阿马尔·梅米奇替补登场，换下尼古拉·卡蒂克。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Kerim Alajbegovic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 克里姆·阿拉贝戈维奇射门被封堵。

player.name: 埃斯米尔·巴伊拉克塔雷维奇

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ermin Mahmic (Bosnia and Herzegovina).

events.description: 埃斯米尔·巴伊拉克塔雷维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Malik Tillman (USA) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Weston McKennie.

events.description: 马利克·蒂尔曼射门被封堵。 韦斯顿·麦肯尼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, USA. Christian Pulisic is caught offside.
Sergiño Dest (USA) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 斯捷潘·拉德尔吉克犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Stjepan Radeljic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 斯捷潘·拉德尔吉克吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! USA 2, Bosnia and Herzegovina 0. Malik Tillman (USA) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the top left corner.

events.description: 马利克·蒂尔曼破门。 比分 2-0。

qualifiers.espnText: Matt Freese (USA) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 埃梅丁·德米洛维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Matt Freese (USA).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, USA. Sebastian Berhalter replaces Sergiño Dest.

events.description: 塞巴斯蒂安·伯哈尔特替补登场，换下塞尔吉诺·德斯特。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, USA. Ricardo Pepi replaces Christian Pulisic.

events.description: 里卡多·佩皮替补登场，换下普利西奇。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Amar Memic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right is blocked.

events.description: 阿马尔·梅米奇射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Stjepan Radeljic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Fourth official has announced 10 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时10分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Kerim Alajbegovic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) right footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Stjepan Radeljic.

events.description: 克里姆·阿拉贝戈维奇射门偏出。 斯捷潘·拉德尔吉克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Stjepan Radeljic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Amar Memic (Bosnia and Herzegovina).
Substitution, USA. Giovanni Reyna replaces Weston McKennie.

events.description: 乔瓦尼·雷纳替补登场，换下韦斯顿·麦肯尼。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Alex Freeman (USA) right footed shot from the right side of the box is high and wide to the right.

events.description: 亚历克斯·弗里曼射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ermin Mahmic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Amar Dedic.

events.description: 埃尔敏·马赫米克射门偏出。 阿马尔·德迪奇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Ermin Mahmic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Benjamin Tahirovic following a fast break.

events.description: 埃尔敏·马赫米克射门偏出。 本杰明·塔希罗维奇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Tim Ream (USA) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 埃梅丁·德米洛维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, USA. Ricardo Pepi is caught offside.
Second Half ends, USA 2, Bosnia and Herzegovina 0.
